method_summary: Composite biophysical scoring framework. Four axes — thermal Arrhenius kinetics, pH-dependent interface salt-bridge integrity, AlphaFold interface-pLDDT structural integrity, Hofmeister salt-stability factor — combined into a per-condition retention-fraction prediction over the shio-koji ferment window, with ±sigma uncertainty bracketing.

thermal_axis._note: Sub-Tm regime applies f_u² scaling for kinetic refolding protection (refolding outcompetes aggregation when native is energetically favored)
